zh.lifeSummary: 當María Fernández de Rojas於1232年出生在西班牙時，她的父親Fernán González de Rojas Cruçado32歲，母親Elvira Martínez de Ayala30歲。她和Diego López de Velascuri至少有2個女兒。她去世於1300年在她的家鄉享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rojas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Carlos, Manuel, Jorge, Jesus, Francisco, Pedro, Ricardo, Rafael, Raul.
Spanish: habitational name from any of the places called Rojas in Burgos province, from a derivative of rojo ‘red’. Compare Rojano and Roxas .

variants.name: Roxas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Nestor, Rodolfo, Francisco, Manuel, Ramon, Ana, Annaliza, Arsenio, Aureo, Beatriz, Cristina.
Spanish: variant of   Rojas  . This surname is very rare in Spain; it is found mainly in the Philippines.

variants.name: Rojano
meanings: Spanish: habitational name for someone from Rojas (see Rojas ) or another place called with rojo or roja ‘red’, from an adjectival form of the placename.

nameMeanings.name: María
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Maria
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Fernández
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Carlos, Luis, Jorge, Miguel, Fernando, Mario, Jesus, Pedro, Francisco.  Portuguese Ligia, Joao, Armanda, Godofredo, Wenceslao.

Spanish (Fernández): patronymic from the personal name Fernando . The surname (and to a lesser extent the variant Hernandez ) has also been established in southern Italy, mainly in Naples and Palermo, since the period of Spanish dominance there.

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the name in 1 above at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some Jewish descendants retained the surname that their families had adopted as Roman Catholics.

variants.name: Fernando
meanings: A modern form of the old Spanish name Ferdinando, which is of Germanic (Visigothic) origin, from farð ‘journey’ (or possibly an altered form of frið ‘peace’) + nand ‘ready, prepared’. The name was hereditary in the royal families of Spain from an early date. It was borne by Ferdinand I ( d. 1065 ) of Castile and Leon, who conducted successful campaigns against the Moors, and by his descendant Ferdinand V ( 1452–1516 ), who finally expelled the Moors from Spain altogether; he also gave financial backing to Columbus. Through the marriage in 1496 of his daughter Joan the Mad of Castile to the Habsburg Archduke Philip , the name Ferdinand also became hereditary in the Austrian imperial family. Their younger son, Ferdinand ( 1503–64 ), acquired the succession to the kingdoms of Hungary and Bohemia by marriage in 1521 , and became Holy Roman Emperor in 1558 . See Ferdinand .

en.lifeSummary: When María Fernández de Rojas was born in 1232, in Spain, her father, Fernán González de Rojas Cruçado, was 32 and her mother, Elvira Martínez de Ayala, was 30. She had at least 2 daughters with Diego López de Velascuri. She died in 1300, in her hometown, at the age of 68.

Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Diego López de Velascuri. Elle est décédée en 1300, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Diego López de Velascuri. Morì nel 1300, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Diego López de Velascuri. Она умерла в 1300 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.
